name: 07-10-remote-review-request-materialization
title: Verify remote reviewer requests actually materialize
description: PR #88 showed the direct Copilot review request API returning 422, while gh pr edit --add-reviewer returned success but no reviewRequests/latestReviews/comments appeared after polling. Harden sd-review-pr so a cleared request without review activity is reported or retried with repo-configured evidence instead of being treated as a completed remote review.
creator: sdelmas
